---
title: "Bladimir | CV"
---

You can download my full CV as a PDF below.

<a href="academicCV.pdf" target="_blank" class="cv-button">⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>

You can see some relevant aspects of my professional career below.

::: {.section-title}
Education
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Ph.D. in Psychological &amp; Quantitative Foundations</strong> <em>(expected May 2027)</em><br>
  University of Iowa, Iowa City, USA<br>
  Dissertation: <em>"In Progress"</em><br>
  Committee: Ariel Aloe, TBD, TBD, TBD
</p>

<p>
  <strong>M.A. in Psychological &amp; Quantitative Foundations</strong> (December 2025)<br>
  University of Iowa, Iowa City, USA<br>
  Thesis: <em>"Conflated Random Slopes in Multilevel Analysis"</em><br>
  Committee: Lesa Hoffman, Jonathan Templin, Ariel Aloe
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Bachelor of Social Work</strong> (March 2018)<br>
  Universidad del Bío-Bío, Chillán, Chile
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Professional Experience
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> (2024–2026)<br>
  Gender stereotypes and career vocation among students in USA, research project by Dr. Rong Su<br>
  Tippie Business College, University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Graduate Teaching Assistant</strong> (2022–2025)<br>
  Advanced quantitative methods courses, University of Iowa, USA<br>
  PSQF 6246: Design of Experiments · PSQF 6249: Factor Analysis and SEM · PSQF 6270: Generalized Linear Models · PSQF 6271: Longitudinal Multilevel Models · PSQF 7375: Bayesian Psychometric Modeling · PSQF 6272: Clustered Multilevel Analysis
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> (Summer 2023)<br>
  Psychometric Evaluation of the NEEDS 6 Assessment, research project by Dr. Lesa Hoffman<br>
  Department of Psychological and Quantitative Foundations, University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> (Fall 2021)<br>
  Iowa Reading Research Center (IRRC), University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Researcher &amp; Lecturer</strong> (2018–2021)<br>
  Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE, Universidad del Bío-Bío, Chile<br>
  Lecturer in Quantitative Data Analysis Techniques and Quantitative Data Collection Techniques
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Research Assistant</strong> (2015–2018)<br>
  Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE, Universidad del Bío-Bío, Chile
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Publications
:::

See the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Teaching Experience
:::

See the [Teaching](teaching.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Awards & Fellowships
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Outstanding Teaching Assistant Award</strong> (2025)<br>
  University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>T. Anne Cleary Psychological Research Scholarship</strong> (2024)<br>
  University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Travel Scholarship for Minoritized Professionals in Educational Measurement</strong> (2023)<br>
  Center for Measurement Justice
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Blommers-Hieronymus-Feldt Fellowship</strong> (2023)<br>
  College of Education, University of Iowa, USA
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Equal Opportunities Scholarship (BIO)</strong> (2018)<br>
  Fulbright Commission &amp; National Research and Development Agency (ANID), Chile
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Universidad del Bío-Bío Award</strong> (2018)<br>
  Universidad del Bío-Bío, Chile
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Conference Presentations
:::

```{=html}
<p>
  <strong>Conflated random slopes in multilevel analysis</strong> (October 2025)<br>
  Padilla, B., &amp; Hoffman, L.<br>
  Poster presentation at the annual meeting of the Society for Multivariate Experimental Psychology (SMEP)<br>
  South Bend, Indiana
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Avoiding conflated random slopes in multilevel analysis</strong> (July 2025)<br>
  Padilla, B., &amp; Hoffman, L.<br>
  Poster presentation at the annual meeting of the Psychometric Society (IMPS)<br>
  Minneapolis, Minnesota
</p>

<p>
  <strong>The influence of societal gender equality on career interest gender gaps</strong> (July 2025)<br>
  Su, R., Padilla, B., &amp; Lowery, N.<br>
  Presentation at the annual meeting of the Academy of Management (AOM)<br>
  Copenhagen, Denmark
</p>

<p>
  <strong>Exploring the probabilities of being admitted to university in Chile based on socioeconomic and academic attributes</strong> (April 2023)<br>
  Padilla, G., &amp; Mojoyinola, M.<br>
  Paper presented at the annual meeting of the American Educational Research Association (AERA)<br>
  Chicago, Illinois
</p>
```

::: {.section-title}
Software
:::

**R/RStudio** (advanced) · **Stata** (intermediate) · **Mplus** (intermediate)

<a href="#top" class="back-to-top">↑ Back to top</a>
